Name: RavenDB - Smuggler - Move Data Between Databases
Description: To move data directly between two instances (or different databases in the same instance) using the between option introduced in Smuggler version 3.

Parameters.Name: ravenSmugglerPath
Parameters.Label: Raven Smuggler Path
Parameters.HelpText:
Full path to the Smuggler EXE. 
 
For example **C:\RavenDB\Smuggler\Raven.Smuggler.exe**

Parameters.Name: sourceDatabaseUrl
Parameters.Label: Source Database URL
Parameters.HelpText:
The URL of the Raven database, where the **Source Database** is located. 

For example **http://localhost:8080/**

Parameters.Name: sourceDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Name of the Source Database
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the **Source Database** in Raven.

Parameters.Name: sourceDatabaseApiKey
Parameters.Label: API Key for the Source Database
Parameters.HelpText:
API Key needed to access the **Source Database**. 

If key is not provided, anonymous authentication will be used.

For more information: http://ravendb.net/docs/article-page/3.0/csharp/studio/accessing-studio

Parameters.Name: destinationDatabaseUrl
Parameters.Label: Destination Database URL
Parameters.HelpText:
The URL of the Raven database, where the **Destination Database** is located. 

For example **http://localhost:8080/**

Parameters.Name: destinationDatabaseName
Parameters.Label: Name of the Destination Database
Parameters.HelpText: Name of the **Destination Database** in Raven.

Parameters.Name: destinationDatabaseApiKey
Parameters.Label: API Key for the Destination Database
Parameters.HelpText:
API Key needed to access the **Destination Database**. 

If key is not provided, anonymous authentication will be used.

For more information: http://ravendb.net/docs/article-page/3.0/csharp/studio/accessing-studio

Parameters.Name: OperateDocuments
Parameters.Label: Operate on Documents
Parameters.HelpText:
With Raven backup, you can choose which types are operated during the backup.

Unselect this option to exclude **Documents** from the copying process.

Parameters.Name: OperateAttachments
Parameters.Label: Operate on Attachments
Parameters.HelpText:
With Raven backup, you can choose which types are operated during the backup.

Unselect this option to exclude **Attachments** from the copying process.

Parameters.Name: OperateIndexes
Parameters.Label: Operate on Indexes
Parameters.HelpText:
With Raven backup, you can choose which types are operated during the backup.

Unselect this option to exclude **Indexes** from the copying process.

Parameters.Name: OperateTransformers
Parameters.Label: Operate on Transformers
Parameters.HelpText:
With Raven backup, you can choose which types are operated during the backup.

Unselect this option to exclude **Transformers** from the copying process.

Parameters.Name: timeout
Parameters.Label: Timeout
Parameters.HelpText: The timeout (in milliseconds) to use for requests.

Parameters.Name: WaitIndexing
Parameters.Label: Wait for Indexing
Parameters.HelpText: Wait until all indexing activity has been completed (Import Only).
